generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HorizontalActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor with associated controller for precise horizontal movement control along the gantry crane's bridge axis. Operates within defined actuation ranges with safety constraints to prevent collisions or overloading."
]

instance VerticalActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor with associated controller for precise vertical movement control along the gantry crane's trolley axis. Supports remote control interfaces for trajectory execution."
]

instance HoistElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet integrated at the end of the hoist mechanism to securely pick up and release container-like pucks. Operates within predefined actuation ranges for payload handling."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures angular displacement of the gantry crane's swing mechanism to monitor rotational kinematics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance CraneAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors environmental airflow conditions that may affect crane operations, ensuring operational safety and performance."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalAirflowData
]

instance RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based sensor system for real-time air quality data collection in the Air Quality Management exemplar. Specific sensor types not detailed but integrated for runtime visualization and prediction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
    base:desc "Continuously transmitted angular displacement data from the Swing Angle Encoder to the TimescaleDB database for trajectory validation and kinematic analysis."
]

instance EnvironmentalAirflowData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAnemometer
    base:desc "Continuously transmitted environmental airflow measurements to the TimescaleDB database for operational safety monitoring and system state validation."
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
    base:desc "Comprehensive state data including kinematic measurements (puck coordinates, joint angles, acceleration), operational states (controller commands, sensor readings), and trajectory execution logs transmitted via MQTT Broker."
]

instance AirQualitySensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Raspberry Pi-based air quality monitoring system, transmitted for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "High-fidelity CAD model of the lab-scale gantry crane created using Autodesk Fusion 360, including geometric and assembly details for visualization and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GantryKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical representation of the gantry crane's joints, linkages, and degrees of freedom enabling accurate simulation of motion trajectories and dynamic behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering representation of the Air Quality Management system using AutomationML, defining components, behaviors, and interdependencies for digital twin implementation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualitySimulationEnabler, AirQualityPredictionEnabler
]

instance PrerecordedGreenhouseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Pre-recorded sensor data stored in virtual machine images for GreenhouseDT initialization and testing, supporting self-adaptive behavioral insights."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured kinematic measurements including puck coordinates, joint angles, and acceleration derived from real-time sensor data for trajectory generation and validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, EnvironmentalAirflowData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance AirQualityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed air quality metrics from Raspberry Pi sensors, structured for runtime visualization, simulation, and predictive analytics in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualitySensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualitySimulationEnabler, AirQualityPredictionEnabler
]

instance HistoricalCraneOperationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-resolution time-series data of sensor readings (position, velocity, load) and control inputs for post-processing, trend analysis, and performance benchmarking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance time-series database for storing and querying operational data (sensor logs, control signals) with PostgreSQL compatibility and real-time analytics capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization platform aggregating and displaying data traces (actuator positions, system health metrics) in real-time or historically, integrated with TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DockerContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization framework facilitating portable, reproducible deployment of digital twin services (logging, visualization) across different environments."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating signaling between services (Logging Application → Database → Dashboard) for real-time data transmission and system coordination."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service leveraging kinematic models to generate optimized trajectories for crane movement, ensuring accurate replication of physical system dynamics."
]

instance SimulationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine using CAD and kinematic models to predict and validate crane behavior under varying conditions."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing fault detection capabilities through anomaly detection and diagnostics."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance AirQualitySimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation component modeling air quality dynamics under varying conditions (e.g., virus spread prevention scenarios) using processed sensor data."
]

instance AirQualityPredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics module using processed air quality data to forecast future states and support decision-making."
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation models for the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, relying on prerecorded data for initialization and self-adaptive insights."
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control optimization service generating optimal control signals for crane actuators based on kinematic models and real-time sensor feedback. Supports closed-loop validation by comparing digital predictions with physical execution."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlSignalAction, ClosedLoopValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage and retrieval service logging sensor data (position, velocity, load) and control inputs at high temporal resolution for post-processing, trend analysis, and performance benchmarking."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationTrendInsight, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D/2D visualization service rendering CAD models synchronized with real-time telemetry (crane position, payload status) for debugging and educational demonstrations."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight, ControlErrorVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization and discrepancy detection service comparing digital twin outputs (predicted trajectories) with physical twin telemetry to detect divergences and trigger corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationDiscrepancyInsight, ModelUpdateAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection and diagnostics service using machine learning or rule-based methods to identify faults (motor stalls, sensor drift) by analyzing residuals between digital and physical states."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight, RootCauseHypothesisInsight
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization service providing real-time indoor air quality metrics from Raspberry Pi sensor data for monitoring and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive service forecasting future air quality states using processed sensor data to support decision-making in air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityForecastInsight
]

instance GreenhouseInsightService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Self-adaptive behavioral insights service for the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, leveraging prerecorded data for initialization and testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseBehavioralInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalControlSignalAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates and transmits optimal control signals to crane actuators for precise movement execution."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ClosedLoopValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Compares digital twin predictions with physical execution to validate control algorithms and system performance."
]

instance CraneOperationTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analyzes historical crane operation data to identify performance trends and operational patterns."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detects anomalies in crane operation data indicating potential faults or performance degradation."
]

instance CraneStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides interactive 3D/2D visualization of crane states synchronized with real-time telemetry for operational monitoring."
]

instance ControlErrorVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizes control errors and discrepancies between digital twin predictions and physical execution for debugging."
]

instance ValidationDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies discrepancies between digital twin outputs and physical twin telemetry to assess model accuracy."
]

instance ModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers updates to digital twin models based on detected discrepancies to improve prediction accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides alerts for detected faults in the physical crane system (e.g., motor stalls, sensor drift)."
]

instance RootCauseHypothesisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates hypotheses for root causes of detected faults based on residual analysis between digital and physical states."
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays real-time air quality metrics from Raspberry Pi sensors for runtime monitoring and analysis."
]

instance AirQualityForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicts future air quality states based on processed sensor data to support decision-making."
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides self-adaptive behavioral insights for the physical greenhouse and its digital twin based on prerecorded data."
]

// C5: Physical System Components
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program connecting the gantry crane's controllers to the digital twin system, facilitating bidirectional data flow for real-time synchronization."
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded controller (likely PLC or microcontroller-based) managing real-time actuation and feedback for the gantry crane's motors and electromagnet."
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory setting with predefined motion constraints for the gantry crane, supporting research and educational use cases."
    base:contains PhysicalCraneInterface, CraneController, HorizontalActuator, VerticalActuator, HoistElectromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, CraneAnemometer
]

// Additional required instances
instance GreenhouseSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Pre-recorded sensor data from greenhouse environment used for initialization and testing of GreenhouseDT."
]

instance CraneLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for collecting and transmitting crane state data to the digital twin system for logging and analysis."
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing visualization capabilities for crane state data and system health metrics."
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler facilitating historical data logging and storage for crane operation data."
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing continuous validation capabilities by comparing digital twin outputs with physical twin telemetry."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows from the digital twin to the physical gantry crane are mediated by the **Control Application**, a Python program that uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to send commands to the crane’s controllers. Command types include trajectory setpoints (optimized by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) and operational directives (e.g., puck pickup/drop, emergency stops). Control messages are formatted as structured data (likely serialized via Python’s native types or MQTT payloads) and transmitted via the **MQTT Broker**. Validation and authentication mechanisms are not explicitly described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly enforces consistency by comparing executed trajectories to simulations, triggering alerts if deviations exceed thresholds. Feedback systems include real-time state updates from the **Logging Application** and dashboard notifications via **Grafana**. Conflict resolution is not detailed, but the system’s modular architecture (e.g., separate containers for control, logging, and validation) suggests prioritization of validated trajectories over raw commands. Command execution confirmation is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which verifies trajectory adherence post-execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents adopt a **modular, ad-hoc orchestration pattern** with **lightweight integration** rather than relying on proprietary frameworks. Key components include:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Uses **InfluxDB (time-series database)**, **ActiveMQ (message broker)**, and **virtual machines** for behavioral adaptation, indicating a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with **loosely coupled components** for real-time and batch data processing.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Implements an **AutomationML-based Digital Twin** with **Microsoft Azure tools**, suggesting a **hybrid cloud-edge architecture** where the **Raspberry Pi (edge)** collects sensor data, and **Azure (cloud)** handles simulation/prediction. The **C4 Model** (context/container diagrams) is used for architectural visualization, emphasizing **component decomposition** (e.g., runtime visualization, simulation, prediction services).
  - **Gantry Crane**: Described via **C4 Model**, implying a **containerized or microservices-based constellation** with clear **scope separation** (e.g., control systems, monitoring). The **cyber-physical system (CPS) focus** requires **real-time coordination** between physical actuators (e.g., crane movements) and digital representations.
  Common orchestration themes include:
    - **Containerization/virtualization** for dissemination (e.g., VMs in GreenhouseDT, implied in gantry crane).
    - **Event-driven or message-passing** (ActiveMQ) for inter-component communication.
    - **Domain-specific pipelines** (e.g., Azure for air quality, AutomationML for modeling), avoiding monolithic frameworks.
  The **lack of a unified framework** necessitates **manual coordination** between physical and digital layers, with **domain-driven adaptations** (e.g., agricultural self-adaptation in GreenhouseDT vs. logistics in the gantry crane)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The lab-scale gantry crane Digital Twin includes a **Continuous Validation Service** that performs real-time comparisons between **executed trajectories** (measured via sensors) and **simulated trajectories** (generated by the kinematic model). The system calculates **distance metrics** to quantify deviations and enforces an **acceptable threshold** for error tolerance. If discrepancies exceed this threshold, corrective actions are triggered to maintain model fidelity. The GreenhouseDT exemplar emphasizes **behavioral adaptation** of both the physical system and its Digital Twin, though specific validation methods are not detailed. The Air Quality Management exemplar focuses on **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** but does not explicitly describe fidelity validation processes in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates within a **service-oriented architecture** hosted on a **personal computer**, with containers deployed via Docker (implied by modular service design). The **MQTT Broker** (Eclipse Mosquitto) serves as the central hub for inter-service communication, enabling asynchronous messaging between components like the **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service**. Network topology is **local/on-premise**, with no explicit mention of cloud dependencies or distributed nodes. Bandwidth/latency requirements are unspecified but inferred to be low-latency for real-time trajectory validation (e.g., sub-second updates for distance metric comparisons). Redundancy mechanisms are absent, as the system lacks explicit failover protocols. Security protocols are not documented, though the use of a dedicated **Database** (TimescaleDB) and isolated services suggests minimal exposure to external threats. Data transmission from the **Logging Application** to the database is direct (not explicitly via MQTT), while service-to-service interactions rely on the broker."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed on-premise alongside the physical gantry crane system. The **TimescaleDB database** serves as the central storage for all system-generated data, including trajectory logs, sensor readings, and simulation outputs. Computational requirements are distributed across six containers: the **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematics modeling), **Simulation Service** (physics-based emulation), **Continuous Validation Service** (real-time metric calculations), and auxiliary services (MQTT Broker, Dashboard). Scalability mechanisms are not specified, but the modular design (e.g., separate services for trajectory generation and validation) allows for horizontal scaling of individual components if needed. Deployment models are containerized (via Python applications) but not explicitly cloud-based; the system operates independently of external platforms. Availability/reliability assurance is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**’s proactive monitoring and alerting, though no redundancy (e.g., backup databases or failover brokers) is mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **partial standardization**:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Uses **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for interoperability, but no explicit industry standards are cited.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Adopts **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, a **construction/engineering standard** for automation systems, and leverages **Microsoft Azure** (proprietary but widely adopted).
  - **Interoperability**: All exemplars rely on **open-source dissemination** (GitHub) and **containerization/virtualization**, but no formal certification or compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC 23247 for Digital Twins) are mentioned. The **ad-hoc approach** limits adherence to rigid standards, prioritizing flexibility over compliance."
]
